overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban commercial district in GTA V. The camera moves from a crosswalk intersection past palm trees and storefronts toward a distant neon-lit skyline, with wet pavement reflecting streetlights and signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with crosswalk and traffic signal

events.description: traffic signal changes from green to red

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk at a rainy intersection, pausing as the traffic light changes to red

entered.detail: tall illuminated real estate sign with red and white lettering
traffic light mounted on pole at intersection corner
white zebra stripes painted on wet asphalt
large white cylindrical planters containing tall palm trees
low-rise commercial buildings with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rain-soaked urban intersection at night. The Dynasty 8 real estate sign glows prominently on the left while the camera faces a crosswalk. The traffic signal changes from green to red as rain continues to fall, creating reflective pools on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved sidewalk along commercial street with distant downtown skyline

events.description: bright flash of lightning illuminates the rainy sky briefly

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet curved sidewalk, passing rows of palm trees while approaching the neon-lit downtown skyline

entered.detail: tall skyscrapers with colorful neon lighting visible through the rain
tall street light casting glow on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Moving along the curved sidewalk away from the intersection, the camera passes palm trees in white planters on the left. The Dynasty 8 sign and traffic light fall behind as the view opens toward a distant neon-lit skyline. A brief flash of lightning illuminates the rainy sky above the skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban intersection toward a distant, neon-lit city skyline. It begins at a crosswalk where a glowing Dynasty 8 real estate sign illuminates the left side of the frame as a traffic signal shifts from green to red. As the camera moves along the curved sidewalk, the intersection and signage recede, passing palm trees in white planters that line the path. The view then opens up to reveal a sprawling skyline of skyscrapers, just as a brief flash of lightning illuminates the dark, rainy sky. The scene finally settles on the distant glow of the city, with the wet asphalt reflecting the surrounding urban lights.
